title: Referral safety decision result
description: Output of the Phase 5 rules & safety decision engine for a single referral. SYNTHETIC DATA ONLY. It consumes a Phase 4 extraction result plus a patient-match outcome (against OpenMRS, or the synthetic-patient seed file for the offline acceptance gate) and produces a deterministic, fully reason-coded routing decision. The LLM never reaches this layer: rules + human review own every safety-sensitive outcome. Every decision carries at least one reason code, and any safety flag blocks auto-create (risky -> human).

synthetic.description: Hard constraint: this project only ever processes synthetic data.

patient_match_source.description: Where patient matching was performed. 'local-seed' = the committed synthetic_patients.json (deterministic offline gate); 'openmrs' = live OpenMRS REST (the Phase 8 production path).

match_result.description: Patient-match outcome. NOT_APPLICABLE when the document is not a referral or could not be read (no match is attempted).

matched_patient.description: The single patient this referral was bound to (EXACT/DOB_MISMATCH/PARTIAL). null for MULTIPLE_CANDIDATES, NO_MATCH and NOT_APPLICABLE.

existing_referral_status.description: e.g. 'none' or 'active:Cardiology'. Drives the duplicate-referral check.

candidate_count.description: How many OpenMRS/seed patients matched. >1 => MULTIPLE_CANDIDATES (cannot safely disambiguate).

safety_flags.description: Every safety-relevant condition detected. A non-empty list blocks auto-create.

reason_codes.description: Machine-readable reasons driving the decision. ALWAYS at least one (auditability requirement).

final_status.description: The INTENDED terminal status for this decision. The actual OpenMRS write/verify (for AUTO_CREATE) and review-store write (for HUMAN_REVIEW) happen in Phase 6/8/9; this engine decides the outcome, it does not perform it.

decision_reasons.description: Human-readable narrative for each reason code (audit trail).

upstream.description: The extraction-level facts this decision was based on (carried for the audit trail).

decided_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of the decision.
